question: Return the names of friends of the high school student Kyle.
gold_sql: SELECT T3.name FROM Friend AS T1 JOIN Highschooler AS T2 ON T1.student_id  =  T2.id JOIN Highschooler AS T3 ON T1.friend_id  =  T3.id WHERE T2.name  =  "Kyle"
predicted_sql: SELECT T2.name FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.student_id JOIN highschooler AS T2 ON T3.friend_id = T2.id WHERE T1.name = 'Kyle';
raw_response: SELECT T2.name FROM highschooler AS T1 JOIN friend AS T3 ON T1.id = T3.student_id JOIN highschooler AS T2 ON T3.friend_id = T2.id WHERE T1.name = 'Kyle';
